_readme: KELEDON autonomous task queue — optimized for Claude Sonnet 4.6. Read fully before touching any file.

session_state.last_completed: B-008 DONE — PR #35 open with B-005 through B-008: structured RPA step execution, Azure Trusted Signing CI, version dynamic from package.json, auto patch bump workflow
session_state.next_action: Merge PR #35 into main. After merge: verify B-007 (version badge shows 0.2.x in landing), verify B-008 (bump commit appears on main), smoke test B-005 end-to-end voice→ui_steps flow

tasks.title: Fix CDP Connection - use Electron APIs directly for BrowserView control
Enhance Goal Mapper with Better Pattern Matching
Fix Logs - lazy initialization of log paths
Fix Installer Size - pre-build cleanup script
Release Ops: branch hygiene + CI skeleton
tasks.what: 5 phases: branch pruning (17 local deleted), release.yml (fixed build + signing gate + cloud deploy + landing update), signing policy (Azure Trusted Signing), E2E runbook (5 scenarios), docs spine.
tasks.acceptance: PR merged to main, branch-governance.md committed, release.yml triggers on vX.Y.Z tags

backlog.title: WebRTC + RPA Voice Integration
backlog.notes: ElevenLabs audio wired into brain:command flow. WebRTC injector (spec-compliant getUserMedia override). Consent UI. ui_steps handler. v0.2.0.

backlog.title: Release v0.2.0 + Next Planning
backlog.notes: v0.2.0 tagged, CI passed, GitHub Release live (KELEDON.Browser.Setup.0.2.0.exe + keledon-v0.2.0-win-x64.zip). 69 stale branches pruned. release.yml: contents:write perm + deploy-cloud via hook.

backlog.title: OpenAI TTS Fallback
backlog.notes: cloud/src/tts/tts.service.ts: speakWithOpenAI() added. Auto-selects ElevenLabs > OpenAI > mock. OPENAI_API_KEY set in Railway. brain:audio now delivers real TTS.

backlog.title: RPA step execution + assert action type
backlog.notes: autobrowse-bridge: executeSteps() export, assert action type, ACTION_TYPE_MAP for cloud→internal normalization. main.ts: executor:executeSteps calls bridge.executeSteps(). device.gateway: emits brain:command(ui_steps) when decision engine returns ui_steps — was silently swallowed before.

backlog.title: Azure Trusted Signing CI integration
backlog.notes: release.yml: azure/trusted-signing-action@v0.3.20 step, gated on AZURE_SIGNING_ENABLED=true. docs/WINDOWS_SIGNING_POLICY.md: complete Azure setup checklist (account, cert profile, App Registration, 6 secrets + 2 variables).

backlog.title: Fix stale version in dashboard debug report
backlog.notes: debug-report.ts and Sidebar.tsx: hardcoded versions replaced with __APP_VERSION__ Vite define. vite.config.ts reads from package.json at build time. vite-env.d.ts declares global.

backlog.title: Auto patch version bump on merge to main
backlog.notes: .github/workflows/version-bump.yml: bumps patch in browser/cloud/landing package.json + LaunchKeledonPage.tsx download URL on every main push; skips chore(release): commits to prevent loops.

context.canonical_loop: Scan -> Claim -> Plan -> Execute -> Commit -> Push -> PR -> Report -> Scan
global_guardrails: Cloud decides, Browser executes. Never add decision logic to browser/.
Never modify docs/specs/ without a governance Issue.
Never declare completion without a PR.
NO Google Generative AI API - Ollama/OpenAI only
